title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins is drawn into a dangerous quest to reclaim a lost dwarf kingdom from the dragon Smaug. The story explores courage, friendship, and the gradual growth of an unlikely hero through magic and peril.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: On the desert planet Arrakis, Paul Atreides becomes entangled in imperial politics, prophecy, and ecological survival. The novel combines space conflict, religion, and strategy in a future world.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
description: A tense mystery unfolds when Amy Dunne disappears and suspicion falls on her husband Nick. The narrative blends unreliable perspectives, crime investigation, and psychological manipulation.
